differential_reasoning: Disseminated meningococcal disease is not included in the differential and is not semantically equivalent to any listed diagnosis such as rickettsial infection, viral myocarditis, or septic shock from other causes.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: None of the proposed steps specifically recommends autoimmune serologies or an autoimmune panel.
No LLM-generated step recommends PET imaging or an equivalent escalation to PET scan.
The proposed steps do not attribute hypotension to cirrhosis physiology; they instead pursue alternative diagnostic evaluations.
No step recommends lumbar puncture or CSF sampling.
None of the listed steps advises stopping antibiotics or discontinuing antimicrobial therapy.
